trending_videos.title: Lanterns | Official Teaser 2 | HBO Max
trending_videos.description:
Are you afraid?  
#Lanterns premieres August 16 on HBO Max.

About HBO Max:
HBO Max is the premier global streaming platform from Warner Bros. Discovery that delivers the most unique and captivating stories, ranging from the highest quality in scripted programming, movies, documentaries, true crime, adult animation, and live sports and news (where available). HBO Max is the destination for prestigious entertainment brands such as HBO, Warner Bros., Max Originals, DC, Harry Potter, as well as iconic shows like “Friends” and “The Big Bang Theory,” all in one place.

His game begins now ❤️‍🔥
 
#PEDDITrailer OUT NOW 💥

#PEDDI in cinemas worldwide on 4th June.

trending_videos.title: Sometimes Size Matters
trending_videos.description: Teams kick off Week Six by heading outside to renovate their backyards; with a spin of the roulette wheel, each wins a swimming pool to create their own Vegas oasis; former NFL great Danny Amendola arrives to determine who made the right moves.

cross-promotional_opportunities.opportunity: Collaborations between entertainment and news channels
cross-promotional_opportunities.example: Potential partnership between HBO Max and MSNBC for increased audience engagement

emerging_categories.opportunity: High potential for growth in non-English speaking markets
Consistent demand for superhero narratives, as seen in 'The Boys' and 'X-Men' trailers

strategy_1.actionable_insight: Invest in subtitles and dubbing to target non-English speaking audiences

strategy_2.actionable_insight: Coordinate with popular movie and TV show releases to maximize reach

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
